## [21:13 - 23:11]

There are some people that come in that might not have crazy skill, they might only have a little bit of sales experience, but they're super, super hungry. They've been through some training and they just want an opportunity to prove themselves. That obviously makes sense. Obviously, you don't want people that are going to be wishy-washy and kind of all over the place and don't really have things together. They're good at rapport building. And from there, they're able to explain as well kind of why they left their previous positions and why right now is the right time for a new position and really why they're looking for a new position anyway.
